fields.label: Organization
fields.description: Tenant floor (ADR §3).

fields.label: Branch
fields.description: Primary row-level permission anchor — scoped natively by Frappe User Permissions on Flock Branch (ADR §6.2).

fields.label: Group
fields.description: Group-axis hook surface — the nested-set permission_query_conditions hook narrows a leader to their led subtree (ADR §6.3).

fields.label: Group Path
fields.description: Denormalized group-subtree path (root-first slash-delimited). Roll-up helper ONLY — carries no permission semantics (ADR §9).

fields.label: Status
fields.description: Reporting lifecycle (FLO-6 §4): Scheduled -> Held -> Reported -> Confirmed; Cancelled is terminal from Scheduled/Held.

fields.label: Capacity
fields.description: For planning / registration caps (FLO-7).

fields.label: One-time Event (FLO-7)
fields.description: Approval + registration layer for one-time events. Gated on event_category = One-time; ignored for routine gatherings (FLO-7 §3.1).

fields.label: Event Category
fields.description: Discriminator (FLO-7 §3.1). One-time events layer the tree-based approval workflow; Routine gatherings skip it.

fields.label: Approval Request
fields.description: 1:1 back-reference to the Flock Event Approval authorizing this one-time event (FLO-7 §3.1).

fields.label: Approval Status
fields.options:
Not Required
Draft
Pending Approval
Approved
Rejected
Cancelled
fields.description: Denormalized from the approval doc for fast list filtering + registration gating (FLO-7 §3.1). Set by the approval workflow (FLO-61).

fields.label: Scoped Registration (FLO-7 §3.1/§5)
fields.description: The controllable-scope registration layer for one-time events. Confirmed at final approval (the leader proposes, the final approver confirms the scope); ignored for routine gatherings. MVP scope/capacity/window shipped by FLO-62; invitations + bulk + waitlist auto-promotion land with Phase B (FLO-79).

fields.label: Registration Scope
fields.options:
None
Own Group
Group Subtree
Branch
Branch Subtree
Org-wide
Invited Only
fields.description: Confirmed eligible set (FLO-7 §5). Leader proposes (permlevel 1); final approver confirms. Copied from Flock Event Approval.proposed_registration_scope on final approval (FLO-61). ``None`` = registration closed.

fields.label: Registration Capacity
fields.description: Max registrations; null/0 = uncapped. Capacity check is an atomic conditional UPDATE (FLO-7 §5 #3) so a concurrent registration can't overshoot.

fields.label: Registration Opens On
fields.description: Window start. Null = unbounded on the early side (FLO-7 §5 #1).

fields.label: Registration Closes On
fields.description: Window end. Null = unbounded on the late side (FLO-7 §5 #1).

fields.label: Registration Counters (permlevel 2 — system-maintained)
fields.description: Note: `is_registration_open` (FLO-7 §3.1) is a time-dependent value (Approved AND now-in-window AND registered_count < capacity) that cannot be stored correctly — it goes stale the instant it is saved. The authoritative live hint is the read-only `get_registration_eligibility` REST action (FLO-7 §8), which computes the verdict at request time. A stored/onload badge is a Phase B frontend concern (FLO-79).

fields.label: Registered Count
fields.description: Atomic capacity counter (FLO-7 §3.1/§10). Incremented by the conditional UPDATE on register_for_event; decremented on cancel. Dashboards read counters, never COUNT(*) over 15k rows.

fields.label: Checked-in Count
fields.description: Registrations bridged to Flock Attendance Record (FLO-7 §5 #5). Incremented by check_in_registration.

fields.label: Member Attendance Count
fields.description: System-maintained roll-up counter (incremented by flock.attendance.* event subscribers, ADR §8).

fields.label: Total Attendance Count
fields.description: member + visitor (system-maintained).

fields.label: Attendance Source
fields.description: Which methods captured attendance for this gathering (FLO-6 §3.2).

fields.label: Bulk Job
fields.description: Ref to the bulk ingest background job for large events (FLO-10).
